source_packet.definition: A packet_start event followed by zero or more continuation events within the same source block until the next packet_start.

source_event.definition: One row in the training or validation event metadata, carrying packet_position, onset, end, channel, and exact asset identity.
source_event.limitation: The Phase 4D source_burst_rate_per_second field is not this event count and must not be used as the engine event-rate reference.

clean_plus_one_sweep.definition: Eight-channel coverage with the final seven wrapped transitions equal to +1.

canonical_grammar_mappings.clean_plus_one_sweep: Exactly eight events, all eight channels once, with seven circular +1 transitions.
canonical_grammar_mappings.sweep_with_repeats: At least four events using only circular +1 and same-channel transitions, with both transition types present.
canonical_grammar_mappings.partial_sweep: Two through seven events following circular +1 transitions.
canonical_grammar_mappings.scattered_packet: At least two events on at least two channels with at least one transition that is neither same-channel nor circular +1.
canonical_grammar_mappings.two_impulse_burst: Exactly two events on one channel.
canonical_grammar_mappings.three_impulse_burst: Exactly three events on one channel.

continuation_spacing.definition: For each packet with at least two continuation-to-continuation gaps, the median of gaps after the primary-to-first-continuation gap.
continuation_spacing.repair: Compare the distribution of per-packet trailing-gap medians.

cycle_span.definition: Final event end sample minus first event onset sample.

immediate_motif_repetition.definition: Exact asset equality for globally adjacent events within the same session and source block.

pulse_pattern_prevalence.definition: Packets with at least one continuation divided by all packets.

event_rate.derivation: 752 packet starts / 0.16516582473094663 packet-start event share / 306 seconds

schedule_spectrum.source_definition: Low-frequency FFT peak of signed 10 ms waveform-activity means per channel.
schedule_spectrum.engine_packet_onset_definition: FFT peak of a 10 ms packet-onset impulse train.

grammar_categories.source_definition: Descriptive windows ending after eight-channel coverage or 16 events; a window may contain multiple packet starts.

planner_change_support.packet_timing: Direct Session 1 packet count and duration support the target central rate; the interval distribution remains explicitly provisional.
planner_change_support.continuation_timing: Direct Session 1 primary-gap and trailing-spacing empirical quantiles support the two timing distributions.
planner_change_support.pulse_pattern_prevalence: Direct Session 1 uses the same packets-with-continuations denominator as the engine.
planner_change_support.event_rate: The comparable source event-row rate is derived from packet count and packet-start event share; the unrelated burst-rate field is excluded.
planner_change_support.grammar_weights: Baseline descriptive grammar proportions are used only as provisional builder guidance because the source windows are not one-to-one packet categories.
planner_change_support.motif_repetition: Baseline exact-asset equality across globally adjacent events is semantically equivalent to the engine run metric.
